positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical mandala design featuring interwoven elements of blooming cosmic flora and celestial geometry. Central composition dominated by swirling nebula dust and stylized bioluminescent flowers (lotus, starflowers). The style should mimic ultra-fine engraved ink on a deep midnight blue background, providing a strong, graphic contrast. Use clean, thick linework interspersed with delicate stippling and negative space to define the silhouette. Elements include orbiting moons, constellations traced in fine gold leaf texture, and stylized crescent vines forming a perfect circular wreath. The overall mood is mystical, ethereal, and balanced. Vector art style, clean line art, symmetrical, black and electric cyan color palette, high contrast, suitable for screen printing on dark apparel.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, messy, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, low resolution, bad anatomy, grain, ugly, out of frame, amateur, extra limbs
